description_long: This is a classic wooden barrel with a cylindrical body composed of vertical wooden staves, bound together by two wide metallic hoops—one near the top and one near the bottom. The wood has a natural, weathered texture with visible grain patterns, giving it an authentic, rustic appearance. The top is flat and fully enclosed, constructed from several wooden planks fitted tightly together, suggesting the barrel is sealed. The metallic bands are slightly worn, with a matte gray finish, and provide structural reinforcement to the barrel. There are no visible handles, spouts, or decorative markings on the exterior. The overall design is robust and utilitarian, suitable for storage or transport of goods in urban or industrial settings.
description: A sealed, weathered wooden barrel reinforced with two matte gray metal hoops and a flat, plank-style lid. The exterior is rustic and unmarked, with no visible handles or openings.
description_view_0: The barrel is shown with its flat, plank-style lid and both metal hoops clearly visible, highlighting the wood grain and the octagonal shape of the top.
description_view_1: This view emphasizes the curvature of the wooden staves and the seamless fit of the metal hoops, with subtle wood texture details.
description_view_2: The barrel's side is prominent, showing the vertical alignment of the staves and the even spacing of the metal bands.
description_view_3: Similar to view 1, this angle displays the continuous wood grain and the sturdy construction of the barrel, with no additional features visible.
attribute_banding_or_reinforcement: metal hoops at top and bottom
